name: Lettuce Wedge with Poppy Seed Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine vinegar, onion juice, sugar, mustard, and salt.
2. Stir vigorously by hand or with an electric mixer set on low.
3. Whisk in vegetable oil in a slow, thin stream while continuously beating until the dressing is smooth and thick.
4. Stir in poppy seeds.
5. Cut lettuce into 6 wedges and place each wedge on a chilled salad plate.
6. Ladle 2 or more tablespoons of the dressing over the lettuce to taste.
